/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,vs_msgs_s__rosidl_typesupport_c.cpython-310-aarch64-linux-gnu.so -o rosidl_generator_py/vs_msgs/vs_msgs_s__rosidl_typesupport_c.cpython-310-aarch64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/vs_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c__pyext.dir/rosidl_generator_py/vs_msgs/_vs_msgs_s.ep.rosidl_typesupport_c.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/root/racecar_ws/build/vs_msgs/rosidl_generator_py/vs_msgs:/root/racecar_ws/build/vs_msgs:/opt/ros/humble/lib: rosidl_generator_py/vs_msgs/libvs_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so libvs_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librmw.so libvs_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
